extortion.description: Our vision and mission is crucial to the work we do. Integral to the South African Cities Network is the promotion of good governance and management of South African cities.We analyse strategic challenges facing South African cities, particularly in the context of global economic integration and national development; collect, collate, analyse, disseminate and apply the experience of large city government in a South African context; and promote a shared-learning partnership between different spheres of government to...
